---
title: Voting Statistics
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

df = readxl::read_xlsx("whiteboardpollresults.xlsx")

pollsasked = length(unique(df$question))
votescounted = sum(df$votes)
mostvoted = unique((df %>% filter(votes == max(df$votes)))$option)
mostvotes = max(df$votes)
```

>  ***`r pollsasked`*** polls conducted

>  ***`r votescounted`*** votes counted

> Highest vote count: ***`r mostvotes`*** for ***`r mostvoted`***
